content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt calls this a "public beta" with "still testing" and "rough edges" language (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), implying an unfinished build.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may reject or question builds whose store-facing copy suggests the app is beta-quality, since production App Store releases must be presented as finished products. The release notes explicitly invite users into a "public beta" with expected bugs — this should be rewritten to describe the actual shipped features/fixes instead. Reserve beta language for TestFlight-only communications.
